textPlain: "I long ago stopped questioning a calculator, then stopped questioning Google, and now find that most answers from current AIs are pretty reliable"I made it to the first milestone with you, but no further just yet.I agree with some of the article -- specifically, I can see the value for authors in being included in a training corpus. But I heavily disagree with the "write for AI" suggestion for authors of books -- please, please don't do that. Write for humans.

https://kk.org/thetechnium/ - "Making the Inevitable Obvious"And the entire linked piece is written in this propaganda style. That no longer works except as a morale booster for "AI" cultists who feel that their funding will disappear soon.
